description: Create packages/voice-brain-dump - real-time transcription with auto-categorization and cross-app routing. Stream of consciousness input gets structured into actionable items routed to the appropriate app (tasks, calendar, docs, notifications).
steps: 1. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/package.json (name: @quant/voice-brain-dump, same pattern as generative-media devDependencies + scripts).
2. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/tsconfig.json (composite, ES2022, outDir dist, rootDir src, vitest/globals types).

4. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/types.ts with types: BrainDumpSession (id, userId, startedAt, status, segments), VoiceSegment (id, startTime, endTime, transcript, confidence), ContentCategory ('email'|'task'|'idea'|'note'|'reminder'|'question'), CategorizedItem (id, category, content, extractedEntities, confidence, routeTarget), RouteTarget (app: string, action: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>), RoutingRule (category, targetApp, actionTemplate), TranscriptionConfig (language, model, streaming: boolean), StructuredOutput (session: BrainDumpSession, items: CategorizedItem[], routes: RouteTarget[]).

5. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/transcription/transcriber.ts - VoiceTranscriber class: startSession(config: TranscriptionConfig) -> BrainDumpSession, processChunk(sessionId, audioChunk: Buffer) -> VoiceSegment, endSession(sessionId) -> VoiceSegment[] (all segments), getTranscript(sessionId) -> string (full text).

6. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/categorization/categorizer.ts - ContentCategorizer class: categorize(segment: VoiceSegment) -> CategorizedItem (detect category from content), categorizeBatch(segments: VoiceSegment[]) -> CategorizedItem[], extractEntities(text) -> { dates: string[], people: string[], actions: string[], topics: string[] }.

7. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/categorization/patterns.ts - pattern definitions for each category (email triggers: 'send', 'reply', 'email to'; task triggers: 'todo', 'need to', 'remind me'; idea triggers: 'what if', 'idea:', 'maybe we could'; etc). Export category detection functions.

8. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/routing/router.ts - ContentRouter class: configure(rules: RoutingRule[]), route(item: CategorizedItem) -> RouteTarget (determine which app receives it), routeAll(items: CategorizedItem[]) -> RouteTarget[], getDefaultRules() -> RoutingRule[] (task->calendar, idea->docs, reminder->notifications, email->quantmail).

9. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/routing/targets.ts - define route targets for Quant ecosystem apps: QuantMail (draft email), QuantTasks (create task), QuantDocs (create note/idea), QuantCalendar (create event/reminder), Notifications (set reminder). Export target registry.

10. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/brain-dump-engine.ts - BrainDumpEngine class that orchestrates the full pipeline: startDump(userId, config) -> session, processAudio(sessionId, chunk) -> { segment, categorizedItem?, route? } (real-time pipeline), finishDump(sessionId) -> StructuredOutput (final categorized and routed output).
11. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/index.ts exporting all: types, VoiceTranscriber, ContentCategorizer, ContentRouter, BrainDumpEngine, pattern helpers, target registry.
12. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/__tests__/categorizer.test.ts - test category detection for each type (email, task, idea, note, reminder), entity extraction (dates, people, actions).
13. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/__tests__/router.test.ts - test routing rules, default rules, route-all for mixed items.
14. Create packages/voice-brain-dump/src/__tests__/brain-dump-engine.test.ts - test full pipeline from audio chunk to structured output, session lifecycle.

15. Run: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/voice-brain-dump && pnpm test --filter=@quant/voice-brain-dump
acceptance_criteria: Package compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit in strict mode
VoiceTranscriber manages sessions and processes chunks into segments
ContentCategorizer correctly categorizes text into email/task/idea/note/reminder
Entity extraction pulls dates, people, and actions from text
ContentRouter routes items to correct Quant ecosystem apps
BrainDumpEngine orchestrates full pipeline from audio to structured output
All tests pass via vitest run
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/voice-brain-dump
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/voice-brain-dump
